name: Suite Spot Golf Express
address: 10202 Coldwater Rd Suite E, Fort Wayne, IN 46825
about: Suite Spot Express PV is an unmanned, 24/7 golf simulator facility designed for a quieter, more relaxed environment. It features four private suites equipped with top-of-the-line TrackMan IO launch monitors, each offering comfortable couches and high-quality laser projection. The venue provides flexible access for players to practice or enjoy a round at any time without the crowds of the main location.
why_golfers_like_it: Luxury private suites with top-tier TrackMan technology
Accurate and immersive golf simulation experience

food_and_drink.notes: Outside non-alcoholic food is allowed; venue has no on-site kitchen.
Alcohol with visible labels is not permitted; outside alcohol is not allowed.

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-line launch monitor in each of the four private suites

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players must bring their own clean equipment. Clubs or balls with dirt, marker, or ink are not permitted as they can damage the simulator screens.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside non-alcoholic beverages are allowed, but alcohol with visible labels is not permitted. All trash must be properly disposed of before leaving.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on the simulator software and player pace, but typical rounds range from 1.5 to 2.5 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention kid-friendly policies or amenities. It is designed for a quieter, more relaxed experience, which may not be ideal for young children.
